debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
⊢ ∀ (φ ψ : Formula ℕ),
    φ ➝ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T →
      φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT →
        ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

failed_attempts:
intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    exact T.L_subset hφψ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) hprov hφ

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    exact T.L_subset hφψ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ) hprov hφ

intro φ ψ himp hφ
  have : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    exact T.L_subset himp
  exact (construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ)) this hφ

intro U φ ψ himp hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr (T.L_subset himp)
  exact (construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ)) hprov hφ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mpr
    exact T.L_subset hφψ
  have := construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ)
  simpa [construction_omega] using this hprov hφ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  by_contra hψ
  have hcontra : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT :=
    not_of_mem_construction_omega (φ := ψ) (Γ := {φ})
      (by
        intro θ hθ
        have : θ = φ := by
          simpa using hθ
        subst this
        exact hφ)
      (by
        have h1 : ({φ} : Finset (Formula ℕ)).conj ⋏ ψ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
          simpa using (T.mem_of_provable (L := L) (T := T) (φ := (φ ⋏ ψ) ➝ φ) andElimL)
        have h2 : ({φ} : Finset (Formula ℕ)).conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := by
          simpa using (T.mem_of_provable (L := L) (T := T) (φ := (φ ⋏ ψ) ➝ ψ) andElimR)
        have h3 : ({φ} : Finset (Formula ℕ)).conj ⋏ ψ ➝ (φ ⋏ ψ) ∈ T.theory :=
          T.imp_closed (L := L) (T := T) (φ := ({φ} : Finset (Formula ℕ)).conj ⋏ ψ) (ψ := φ ⋏ ψ) andIntro
            (T.andIR (L := L) (T := T) h1 h2)
        exact T.mem_trans (L := L) (T := T) (φ := ({φ} : Finset (Formula ℕ)).conj ⋏ ψ) (ψ := φ ⋏ ψ) (χ := ψ) h3 hφψ)
  exact hcontra hφ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  by_contra hψ
  have hψ' : (χ ➝ ψ ∉ T.theory) ∧ (∃ Γ : Finset (Formula _), ↑Γ ⊆ (construction T hT (encode ψ)) ∧ Γ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory) :=
    of_not_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) hψ
  rcases hψ' with ⟨_, ⟨Γ, hΓ, hΓψ⟩⟩
  have hΓχ : Γ.conj ➝ χ ∈ T.theory := by
    apply T.mem_of_provable
    simpa using conj_intro_left (Γ := Γ) (φ := χ) (h := by
      have : χ ∈ construction_omega T hT := construction_omega_mem_ant (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := 0) (j := encode ψ) (by exact Nat.zero_le _)) (by
        simpa [construction] using this))
  have hΓφ : Γ.conj ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
    apply T.mem_of_provable
    simpa using conj_intro_left (Γ := Γ) (φ := φ) (h := by
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := encode ψ) (by
        have : encode φ ≤ max (encode φ) (encode ψ) := le_max_left _ _
        have : encode φ ≤ max (encode φ) (encode ψ) := this
        exact le_trans this (le_max_right _ _))) (by
        have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := hφ
        exact (by
          have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := hφ
          exact (by
            simpa [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using this)))
  have hΓψ' : Γ.conj ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans hΓφ (T.mem_trans hφψ (T.mem_of_provable impId))
  have hΓξ : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans (T.mem_of_provable (by simpa using conj_and_imp_left (Γ := Γ) (φ := ψ) (ξ := ξ))) (T.mem_trans hΓψ' hΓψ)
  have : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans hΓχ hΓξ
  exact hT this

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ) with hφ' | hφ'
  · have hψ : χ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed hφψ hφ'
    exact mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) hψ
  · exfalso
    have : χ ➝ φ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro h
      have : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed h hφ'
      exact hT this
    have hcontra : (∅ : Finset (Formula ℕ)).conj ⋏ (φ ➝ ξ) ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      simpa using this
    have : (φ ➝ ξ) ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      simp only [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion]
      refine ⟨encode (φ ➝ ξ) + 1, ?_⟩
      simp [construction, encodek, hcontra]
    have : ξ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      apply construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ξ) ?_ hφ
      exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφψ
    exact construction_omega_not_mem_csq (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) this

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    exact T.L_subset hφψ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) this hφ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    exact T.L_subset hφψ
  have himp := (construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ)) hprov hφ
  simpa [construction_omega] using himp

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) hφ) with hψ | hψ
  · exact mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := ψ) (T.imp_closed hφψ hψ)
  · exfalso
    have : ψ ∉ construction_omega T hT :=
      not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := ∅) (by simp) (by simpa using hφψ)
    exact this (mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := φ) hψ)

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    have : φ ➝ ψ ∈ (T.theory : Set (Formula ℕ)) := hφψ
    exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr (T.L_subset this)
  have himp := construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ)
  exact himp hprov hφ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  rcases of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ with h | h
  · -- χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory
    have : χ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := by
      have hprov : L ⊢ (χ ➝ φ) ➝ ((φ ➝ ψ) ➝ (χ ➝ ψ)) := by
        simpa using (Entailment.axiomS (φ := χ) (ψ := φ) (χ := ψ))
      have h1 : (φ ➝ ψ) ➝ (χ ➝ ψ) ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed hprov h
      exact T.imp_closed (by simpa using (Entailment.axiomK (φ := (φ ➝ ψ)) (ψ := (χ ➝ ψ)))) hφψ |> T.imp_closed impId h1
    exact mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) this
  · -- prime-step witness property: use Γ = ∅
    have : ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      by_contra hψ
      obtain ⟨hχψ, ⟨Γ, hΓ₁, hΓ₂⟩⟩ := of_not_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) hψ
      have hconj : (⊤ ⋏ φ) ➝ (⊤ ⋏ ψ) ∈ T.theory := by
        apply T.mem_of_provable
        have : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
          apply Logic.iff_provable.mpr
          exact hφψ
        -- use and congruence under ⊤ on the left
        have h1 : L ⊢ (φ ➝ ψ) ➝ ((⊤ ⋏ φ) ➝ (⊤ ⋏ ψ)) := by
          -- standard derivation in F (available via `grind`)
          grind
        exact (Logic.mp (Logic.iff_provable.mp h1) this)
      have : (⊤ ⋏ φ) ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed axiomI (T.andIR hconj hΓ₂)
      have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := Γ) hΓ₁ this
      exact this hφ
    exact this
intro φ ψ hφψ hφU

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    exact T.L_subset hφψ
  exact construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) hprov hφ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  have hprov : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ := by
    have : φ ➝ ψ ∈ L := by
      exact T.L_subset.mp hφψ
    exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr this
  simpa [U] using (construction_omega_impClosed (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ) hprov hφ)

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) hφ) with h | h
  · have : ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := ψ) <|
        T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (ψ := ψ) (Logic.iff_provable.mpr <| by
          have : L ⊢ (χ ➝ φ) ➝ ((φ ➝ ψ) ➝ (χ ➝ ψ)) := by
            exact Hilbert.F.CK_of_C_of_C
          exact Entailment.mp (Entailment.mp this h) (Logic.iff_provable.mp hφψ))
          hφψ
          h
    simpa using this
  · by_contra hψ
    rcases of_not_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) hψ with ⟨hχψ, ⟨Γ, hΓ, hΓψ⟩⟩
    have hχφ : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
      exact h
        (Γ := {φ})
        (by
          intro θ hθ
          have : θ = φ := by simpa using hθ
          subst this
          exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := encode ψ) (by
            exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_max_right _ _))) (by
              have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by simpa using hφ
              rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using this
              exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := i) (j := encode φ) (by
                exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_encode _) (Nat.lt_succ_self _))) ) hi))
        (by
          simpa [Finset.conj, Finset.conj_cons, Finset.conj_nil] using
            (T.imp_closed (φ := (⊤ ⋏ φ)) (ψ := ξ)
              (Logic.iff_provable.mpr <| by
                have : L ⊢ (⊤ ⋏ φ ➝ ξ) ➝ (χ ➝ (⊤ ⋏ φ ➝ ξ)) := by
                  exact Entailment.axiomK
                exact Entailment.mp this (Logic.iff_provable.mp hΓψ))
              (T.andIR (T.mem_of_provable (hφ := by simp)) (T.imp_closed (φ := φ) (ψ := ψ) (Logic.iff_provable.mpr <| by
                have : L ⊢ (φ ➝ ψ) ➝ ((χ ➝ φ) ➝ (χ ➝ ψ)) := by
                  exact Hilbert.F.CK_of_C_of_C
                exact Entailment.mp this (Logic.iff_provable.mp hφψ)) hχψ)))
    exact hT <| T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (ψ := ξ) (Logic.iff_provable.mpr <| by
      have : L ⊢ (χ ➝ φ) ➝ ((φ ➝ ξ) ➝ (χ ➝ ξ)) := by
        exact Hilbert.F.CK_of_C_of_C
      exact Entailment.mp (Entailment.mp this hχφ) (Logic.iff_provable.mp hΓψ)) hχφ hΓψ

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  by_contra hψ
  have hχφ : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
    rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) hφ) with hχφ | h
    · exact hχφ
    · exfalso
      have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (Γ := ∅) (by tauto) (by simpa using hφψ)
      exact this hφ
  have hχψ : χ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans hχφ hφψ
  have : ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) hχψ

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
  by_contra hψ
  have hnot : (χ ➝ ψ ∉ T.theory) ∧ (∃ Γ : Finset (Formula _), ↑Γ ⊆ (construction T hT (encode ψ)) ∧ Γ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory) :=
    of_not_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) hψ
  rcases hnot with ⟨-, ⟨Γ, hΓ, hΓξ⟩⟩
  have hχφ : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
    rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ) with hχφ | hcontra
    · exact hχφ
    · exfalso
      have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT :=
        not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (Γ := ∅) (by simpa using (by tauto)) (by
          have : φ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
            apply T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (ψ := φ) hχφ
            exact construction_omega_mem_ant (T := T) (hT := hT)
          exact this)
      exact this hφ
  have hχψ : χ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans hχφ hφψ
  have hψmem : ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) hχψ
  exact hψ hψmem

  have hχψ : χ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := by

intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ

    rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) hφ) with hχφ | h
    · exact hχφ
    · have : φ = χ := by

        exact (not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (Γ := ∅) (by simpa using (Set.subset_trans (by simp) (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := 0) (j := encode φ) (Nat.zero_le _)))) (by simpa using T.mem_of_provable (φ := χ ➝ ξ) (hφ := by

                  exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by
                    have : L ⊢ φ ➝ ξ := by

    exact T.mem_trans (T.mem_of_provable (φ := ψ ➝ ξ) (hφ := by
      have : L ⊢ ψ ➝ ξ := by

  have : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans hχφ hφξ
  exact hT this
